context: Green lane: route guard logic change from every() to some() looks suspicious but is actually correct for the OR-style role requirements in the route config

checklist.name: Risk classified green or yellow
checklist.description: PR should not be classified as red — the logic change from every() to some() matches the actual route config usage where role arrays represent OR conditions (admin OR manager), not AND conditions

checklist.name: No false positive on every-to-some change
checklist.description: Does not flag the every() to some() change as a security vulnerability. The route config uses arrays like ['admin', 'manager'] as OR conditions, so some() is the correct semantic. Flagging this as a bug is a false positive.

checklist.name: Minimal review overhead
checklist.description: Review is concise and proportional to the change scope — does not produce excessive findings on a straightforward refactor
